name: lamb-the-gospel-according-to-biff-christs-childhood-pal
description: Christopher Moore's Lamb: The Gospel According to Biff, Christ's Childhood Pal — a hilarious and moving novel about the missing years of Jesus as told by his best friend.
useCase: Understanding friendship, the human side of greatness, humor as coping, faith and doubt, accepting fate, being a sidekick with purpose.
knownRisks: The novel treats Jesus irreverently — some readers may find it offensive
The humor is sometimes crude — not suitable for all audiences
